title: Kiwi's Better Armor Stands
description: Aims to make armor stands look closer to the default player model.
body:
This resource pack was designed with the intent of recreating the armor stand, so that it resembles the default player model, but is still clearly an armor stand.


This resource pack needs a mod that supports custom entity models! Two are listed below.

1. Optifine

2. EMF (Entity Model Features)

If you are using a custom client such as lunar client, you might already have optifine built in, so be sure to double-check that.

This should work from versions 1.14 to 1.20 if it doesn't, please let me know.
